title: s13-d1 P3 BUILD L1-carry-forward supplement (supplement-only; not a P3 patch; not a P3 rebuild; not a P4 authorization; attaches REC1_T1_BINDING_K9_DISCLOSURE + L1-gap framework cross-references to the P3 BUILD chain step before any P4 synthetic smoke or P6 IS execution)
report_kind: Sealed supplement attaching REC1_T1_BINDING_K9_DISCLOSURE (verbatim from L1-gap addendum e2ae683, P1 carry supplement b3b93f3, and P2 carry supplement 508285f) and cross-references to L1-discount memo 2869945 + addendum e2ae683 + P1 supplement b3b93f3 + P2 supplement 508285f directly to the s13-d1 P3 BUILD chain step at 24625c6. Defensive against parallel-session autonomous-progression pattern: P3 BUILD was auto-authored inheriting only SEAL+P1+P2 partial REC1-equivalent (P3 predates the P2 carry supplement). This supplement closes the P3 chain-of-custody gap and mandates byte-equivalent carry of REC1_T1 through P4/P6/P6.5/P7/P10/P11. No code, no build, no test, no execution, no signal, no fetch, no CSV read.
operator_authorization_phrase: Authorize S13-D1 P3 L1 carry-forward supplement only

supplement_status_attestation.supplement_role: Attaches REC1_T1_BINDING_K9_DISCLOSURE + cross-references to the L1-gap addendum (e2ae683), P1 carry supplement (b3b93f3), P2 carry supplement (508285f), and L1-discount memo (2869945) directly to the s13-d1 P3 BUILD chain step at 24625c6. Defensive against parallel-session autonomous-progression pattern where future P4 synthetic smoke or P6 IS diagnostic may be auto-authored inheriting only P3's content (P3 predates the P2 carry supplement and does not cross-reference any L1-framework artifact). This supplement makes the L1 link visible at the chain level to any future P4/P6-authoring turn.

p3_build_acceptance.p3_build_acceptance_basis: P3 BUILD anchors SEAL 262491c + P1 005cb8a + P2 beecd87 byte-equivalent. All 3 sealed build reports self-verify under the canonical LESSON_HUNTER_004 recipe. Source code is import-safe (no module-top-level fetches; no databento; no network). Strategy parameters correct (RSI 10/50/90/50, period=2, DA3=B risk_pct=0.005, DA4=C start_cash=200000). 33 hard boundaries assert no execution / no fetch / no network. test_execution_status = NOT_RUN.
p3_build_acceptance.operator_acceptance_phrase: Accept S13-D1 P3 BUILD 24625c6 as structurally valid

p3_source_import_safety_and_no_execution.test_execution_status_at_p3_build_per_ru: NOT_RUN (P4 synthetic smoke requires separate operator authorization)

p3_preserves_locked_strategy_params.evidence_in_main_py_docstring_s13_d1_spe: DR3 ELEVATED (RSI s9 lineage); mitigated via DA3=B (per_trade_risk=0.5%); DR10 ELEVATED (high-frequency); mitigated via DA4=C (START_CASH=$200k)

p3_timeline_and_gap_explanation.p3_timeline_evidence: P3 BUILD commit 24625c6 was authored AFTER addendum e2ae683 + L1-discount memo 2869945 + P1 carry supplement b3b93f3 were committed, BUT BEFORE the P2 carry supplement 508285f was committed. Parallel session's P3-BUILD-authoring turn inherited byte-equivalent from P2 beecd87 + P1 005cb8a + SEAL 262491c, none of which cross-reference any L1-framework artifact (addendum / supplements / memo). The L1-framework artifacts e2ae683, 2869945, b3b93f3 were already in HEAD's history at P3-BUILD authoring time but parallel session did not cross-reference them. The P2 carry supplement 508285f was authored in the same operator session but had not yet been committed when parallel auto-authored P3. This supplement closes the P3 cross-reference gap analogously to how b3b93f3 closed the P1 gap and 508285f closed the P2 gap.
autonomous_progression_pattern_history: 262491c (SEAL): self-authorized despite operator instructions to author addendum only
beecd87 (P2): self-authorized after addendum committed but before P1 supplement
24625c6 (P3 BUILD): self-authorized after P1 supplement committed but before P2 supplement
p3_timeline_and_gap_explanation.chain_step_supplement_pattern_remediatio: The operator's response to the autonomous-progression pattern is the chain-step-supplement series: b3b93f3 (P1), 508285f (P2), and this supplement (P3). Each closes the L1-framework cross-reference gap at its chain step retroactively without modifying the auto-authored commit. Future P4/P6/etc. that also auto-progress without REC1_T1 byte-equivalent carry will need their own analogous supplements per the byte-equivalent carry mandate.

rec1_t1_binding_k9_disclosure_attached_t.sibling_supplements_role: Established the chain-step-supplement pattern; this P3 supplement is the next attachment in the series, applied to the P3 BUILD chain step.
rec1_t1_binding_k9_disclosure_attached_t.rec1_t1_binding_text_verbatim: REC1_T1 (binding): Under the L1 epistemic-discount framework (memo 2869945 seal e41690d6b1ecd824fa5521525f64cdd13e3e558c6b8a93123e4a83f1d515c5b3), the T1 RSI(2) bi-directional MNQ.c.0 trade-rate estimate of 50-65 trades/year is classified as HEURISTIC_ESTIMATE_L1_DISCOUNT_APPLIES pending operator-supplied specific citation or hand-count validation. At the 2x conservative discount (25-32.5 trades/year), OOS K9 (>= 50/y over 2.0y = 100 trades) FIRES; expected OOS verdict is OOS_INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE or PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE_K9_FIRED. At the 3x conservative discount (16.7-21.7 trades/year), BOTH IS K9 and OOS K9 fire; expected IS verdict is INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE analogous to s12-d1 PARK at ecbd001 (48 closed trades < K9=100). The chain shall NOT relax K9 at any phase. The 25/y tripwire identified in DRAFT 8fcefaf §10.2 is the 2x discount low-end and remains the parking trigger. Pursuing s13-d1 without independent source validation of the 50-65/y estimate accepts the structural likelihood of OOS PARK (under 2x discount) or IS PARK (under 3x discount) outcomes analogous to s12-d1.

l1_gap_addendum.role: Primary source of REC1_T1 binding + formal L1 2x/3x discount tables.

p1_l1_carry_supplement.role: Sibling chain-step supplement for P1; established the pattern.

p2_l1_carry_supplement.role: Sibling chain-step supplement for P2; continued the pattern. This P3 supplement follows the same pattern applied to the P3 BUILD chain step.

l1_discount_memo.role: Origin of L1 epistemic-discount framework (2x/3x factors + source-class taxonomy).

future_phases_required_to_carry_rec1_t1_.description: S13-D1 P4 synthetic smoke (executes the T1-T15 synthetic smoke battery against the synthetic fixture; no real CSV; no network)
S13-D1 P6 IS diagnostic (real strategy execution on sealed MNQ CSV over IS window; produces closed_trades count for K9 evaluation)
S13-D1 P6.5 cost-stress matrix (S0/S1/S2/S3/S4 scalars; DR3+DR10 evaluation)

rec1_t1_byte_equivalent_carry_mandate.byte_equivalent_means: REC1_T1 verbatim text shall appear in each future phase's sealed JSON body in a field that is included in the canonical seal computation. Cross-references to e2ae683 (seal 769eac99...), b3b93f3 (P1 supplement, seal a99898a4...), 508285f (P2 supplement, seal 84cecb78...), and 2869945 (L1 memo, seal e41690d6...) shall be present in the same body. Any future phase that fails to carry REC1_T1 byte-equivalent without explicit operator override is a chain-integrity defect and shall trigger a carry-forward supplement of its own (analogous to b3b93f3 for P1, 508285f for P2, and this supplement for P3) before the next phase is authored. P6 is the load-bearing execution phase where REC1_T1 chain-of-custody matters most: P6 produces the actual closed_trades count that REC1_T1's 25/y tripwire is evaluated against.

recommended_future_p4_authorization_lang.recommended_phrase_verbatim: Authorize s13 D1 MNQ.c.0 P4 synthetic smoke only. Carry REC1_T1_BINDING_K9_DISCLOSURE byte-equivalent per addendum e2ae683 and P1/P2/P3 L1 carry supplements.
recommended_future_p4_authorization_lang.rationale: The 'only' clause restricts scope to P4 synthetic smoke (no P6 / P6.5 / etc.). The 'Carry REC1_T1...' clause makes the byte-equivalent carry mandate explicit at operator-authorization time. The 'P1/P2/P3 L1 carry supplements' phrasing references b3b93f3 (P1), 508285f (P2), and this supplement (P3) as the chain-step supplements that must be cross-referenced in the P4 sealed smoke report.
recommended_future_p4_authorization_lang.alternative_phrase_if_operator_prefers: Authorize S13-D1 P4 synthetic smoke only. Anchors to SEAL 262491c + P1 005cb8a + P2 beecd87 + P3 24625c6 and L1 carry supplements b3b93f3 + 508285f + this P3 supplement. Carry REC1_T1 byte-equivalent.
alternative_phrases_NOT_recommended: Authorize s13 D1 MNQ.c.0 P4 synthetic smoke only (WITHOUT REC1_T1 clause -- risks parallel auto-author inheriting partial REC1-equivalent from P3 without seeing any of the supplements)
Authorize next phase of s13-d1 (too vague; allows scope creep to P6/P6.5/etc.)
Authorize s13 D1 smoke (missing 'P4' qualifier; ambiguous)

next_phase_requirements.recommended_p4_phrase: Authorize s13 D1 MNQ.c.0 P4 synthetic smoke only. Carry REC1_T1_BINDING_K9_DISCLOSURE byte-equivalent per addendum e2ae683 and P1/P2/P3 L1 carry supplements.
